stemHtml:
Refer to figure or E(LO)2 chart from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Given the following information, identify the two radials which correspond to the aircraft's position.

Aircraft's coordinates: N53°47' W002°42'
POLE HILL (POL) VOR/DME: N53°45' W002°06'
WALLASEY (WAL) VOR/DME: N53°23' W003°08'
